title: Ashley Gavin: My Therapist is Dying
full_description: A hilarious yet arresting hour of narrative-driven comedy chronicling how an anxiety-ridden Ashley Gavin deals with finding out her long-time therapist has been diagnosed with cancer. Fred became her surrogate dad when her real father died when she was 11. Covering 9/11, a detached mother, girlfriends, and mental health, with the fast-paced jokes of a natural storyteller at the top of her form. Sold out with extra shows added.
ai_summary: Ashley Gavin's break-out Fringe hour — about the impending loss of the therapist who has been her surrogate father since age 11 — is a one-woman show that moves between absurdist comedy and genuine grief, arriving at something unexpectedly beautiful.
